name: implement-pagination
system_prompt: You are a helpful coding assistant. Be concise and focus on the code.
turns: Add a response envelope that includes pagination metadata: total count, current page, per_page, and total pages.
What happens when someone requests a page beyond the last page? Return an empty list with correct metadata, not a 404.
Extract the pagination logic into a reusable function that works with any list, not just users.
Add type hints to the pagination function and show the final complete code.
outcome_description: Response implements pagination with page/per_page parameters and list slicing
